summary: Audited project-form object buttons against the delivered role boundary and found a new runtime residual: PM and executive object-button methods that read action definitions hit ir.actions.act_window.view ACL errors, and stage-requirements wizard creation is unavailable for all delivered roles.

notes: The new residual is at object-method runtime level rather than plain action visibility.
Buttons that appear aligned by groups may still fail for PM and executive because env.ref(...).read()[0] touches ir.actions.act_window.view ACL.
Stage requirements wizard creation is not currently available to delivered business roles.

next_step: Open a narrow implementation batch to fix or intentionally narrow the project-form object buttons that still fail at runtime, starting with action_open_project_budgets, action_open_project_contracts, and action_view_my_tasks.
